headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Medtronic, Lowers Price Target to $108
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $115 to $108.

headline: Argus Research Maintains Buy on Medtronic, Lowers Price Target to $115
summary: Argus Research  analyst David Toung   maintains Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $125 to $115.

headline: Boston Scientific closes buyout of Valencia Technologies
summary: The deal positions Boston Scientific to compete with Medtronic for a market that analysts believe is highly under-penetrated.
